response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: There was no pre-existing transcript in the JSON reference, so manual transcription was performed for the spoken section. 2. JSON Usage: Fully manually transcribed and translated the spoken Japanese dialogue; the instrumental-only section at the end has no vocals, so no subtitles were added for that duration. 3. Timing & Pacing: Closely aligned the timecodes to Kazama Iroha's spoken phrases, accounting for her energetic pacing.

subtitles.original: ちょっと皆さん 各自で回収って形で それだけが申し訳ないんですが お土産ありますんで
subtitles.english: I'm sorry that you'll have to go collect it yourselves, but I have a souvenir for you,

subtitles.original: ぜひ気になったら コンビニでプリントしてみてください！
subtitles.english: so if you're interested, please try printing it at a convenience store!

subtitles.original: そして コンビニプリント購入できるのは 7月21日 17時59分までです
subtitles.english: Also, the convenience store prints are available until July 21st at 5:59 PM.

subtitles.original: 概要欄に 写真購入のリンク 多分今マネちゃんがやってくれていると思いますので よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: I think Manager-chan is putting the link to purchase the photo in the description right now, so please check it out!

subtitles.original: そして この後はですね MVの公開と メンバーシップ限定のアンコールライブありますので
subtitles.english: And after this, we'll have the MV premiere and the membership-exclusive encore live,

subtitles.original: そちらも絶対に聴いてくださいね！
subtitles.english: so please be sure to tune in to those as well!

subtitles.original: それでは 皆様 またお会いしましょう！
subtitles.english: Well then, everyone, see you again!

subtitles.original: 最高の誕生日でした！バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: It was the best birthday ever! Bye-bye!
